text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism using a distributed hash table (DHT) like Consul or etcd, integrated with a lightweight, in-memory database (e.g., Redis) for quick access and updates. This ensures that only the most critical and recently modified memories are propagated, reducing latency and improving the efficiency of our parallel execution.
reason: This directly addresses the recent 'WinError 10054' by ensuring that only the most relevant and recent data is sent over the network, optimizing our hyperagents' performance and reducing overhead.
